headline: Auddia Announces LT350 Initiative to Power the Autonomous Vehicle Revolution with Distributed AI Datacenters
summary: Fulfills critical industry technology void and aligns with global shift toward autonomous mobility Distributed AI datacenters positioned for robotaxi and logistics fleets Data offload + charging in one location BOULDER, Colo., March 19, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Auddia Inc. (NASDAQ: AUUD) (“Auddia” or the “Company”) today announced a major initiative to position its LT350 platform as the distributed compute backbone for the rapidly scaling autonomous vehicle (AV) industry.
